item.description:
Improved:
  • Token Usage (2D) and Models popover tooltips clamp inside the visible scroll area, dodge the cursor again, and stay above liquid-glass cards so they no longer hide under the footer or neighboring cards.
Fixes:
  • Resizing the popover height then hovering no longer leaves a fake tooltip dodge from a stale viewport.
  • Models tooltip overlay no longer steals hover from the row underneath.

New:
  • Count more local usage: expanded sources on existing clients (OpenCode v2 databases, Kiro IDE globalStorage and structured sessions, Kimi Code beside legacy Kimi) plus new first-class clients Junie and OpenCodeReview.
  • Grok Agent Limits shows weekly SuperGrok credits and, best-effort, monthly included allowance only when the API returns used/limit; a monthly miss does not sink weekly.
  • Historical quota pace can learn on eligible recurring windows for Codex, Claude, Grok, Antigravity, and Copilot (not every % card; not only Codex Weekly).
Improved:
  • Grok Build multi-turn usage now follows real turn_completed API usage and unified logs when present, so totals match the product more closely than context counters did. Totals may rise versus 1.5.0 — accuracy correction, not new spend.
  • Long-context and routed pricing paths resolve cost more carefully for verified Sakana and LiteLLM-style requests.
  • Usage cache schema advances 29→32 (via 30/31); first launch after this update rebuilds the local usage cache once so new parsers and Grok fixes are not mixed with stale rows; later refreshes stay fast.
Fixes:
  • Grok weekly quota no longer fails the whole card right after a weekly reset when percent fields are omitted.
  • Quota card selections keep internal "|" characters so model-scoped windows are not mis-parsed.
  • Existing Codex, Claude, Copilot, and related parsers tighten duration anchoring and dedup so shared sessions are less likely to double-count.
Not in this release:
  • Copilot Desktop / VS Code chatSessions / Hermes Windows (still in progress)
  • Zcode
  • Model-alias settings UI

New:
  • Browse spending by month, drill into each month's per-model usage, and choose which optional dashboard views appear.
Improved:
  • Codex Weekly historical pace now learns from a clean, account-scoped history so expected usage, run-out timing, and risk stay consistent. Learning starts fresh after this update; Linear pace is used until enough complete weeks are available.
  • Quota cards keep pace, ETA, and risk readable by moving projection details to a second line when space is tight.
Fixes:
  • Monthly keeps message-only activity visible even when its token and cost totals are zero.

Thanks: @yiskang

New:
  • Added Grok Build as a first-class client, including local session usage throughout TokenBar and weekly quota when Grok OAuth credentials are available.
  • Added discovery for named Hermes profiles, including profile-only homes.
  • Added deep Claude workflow transcripts to local usage reports.
Improved:
  • Preserved provider-reported costs from GJC and OpenCode instead of replacing them with estimates.
  • Made usage refreshes reliable when Roo Code, Kilo Code, Cline, Droid, Kimi, or Kiro change metadata stored outside the primary session file.
Fixes:
  • Corrected Jcode turn counts, Pi session and subagent attribution, and nested Copilot agent attribution.
  • Prevented token totals from overflowing on corrupt or extreme input.
  • Corrected Codex model-performance timing so repeated snapshots no longer count overlapping durations.

Thanks: @savourylie

New:
  • Reorder and hide client tabs. Drag providers into your preferred order in Settings and uncheck the ones you don't use; a hidden client vanishes from every number — tab bar, Overview totals, charts, menu-bar title and live rate, every report — and unhiding restores it instantly. Thanks @savourylie (#28).
  • Hide the Agent limits card: a master switch, plus per-client toggles that keep the tab and its numbers. Useful for accounts with usage but no OAuth quota, like Claude Console. Thanks @yiskang (#33, #34).
Fixes:
  • Dropped the phantom "<synthetic>" row from the Claude model breakdown — locally-fabricated zero-token turns; your totals are unchanged. Thanks @starburst3190 (#30).
  • Hourly and Agents now filter per client in the core engine, so a single client's tab no longer shows whole-bucket totals for hours or agents it shares with other clients.
  • Token sums saturate instead of overflowing on corrupt data.

Thanks: @savourylie, @starburst3190, @yiskang

New:
  • Brand logos for the Cline, jcode, MiMo Code, and gjc tabs, instead of a letter badge.
Improved:
  • The client-tab row now scrolls with a plain vertical mouse wheel, so a mouse without a horizontal-scroll wheel can reach every tab.
Fixes:
  • Antigravity CLI now shows the shared Antigravity quota instead of an empty or duplicate limit card.

New:
  • Tracks five more local AI coding tools: Cline, Antigravity CLI, jcode, MiMo Code, and gjc.
Improved:
  • More accurate cost and per-tool attribution across AI token usage.
  • Corrected Codex usage counts for forked and sub-agent sessions.
  • Antigravity CLI usage is now dated per turn, so the live view and daily totals reflect when each turn actually happened.
Fixes:
  • The app no longer crashes if the usage parser hits an unexpected error.
  • More reliable live usage updates, including for the newly added tools.
